title: underwaters
body:
# underwaters

**Project:** [[projects/alphabets]]  
**Series:** [[series/underwaters]] — Vol. I  
**Release year:** ~2010 (exact date unconfirmed)  
**Archive location:** `_Documentation/Music/alphabets/underwaters`  
**Tracks:** 8  

The founding volume of the underwaters series. Establishes the aquatic taxonomy that Colin would develop across five more volumes: sea creatures rendered in surreal, affectionate combinations — swimmer mammoths, blingbling mermaids, ballet starfish. The naming style is distinctly alphabets: lowercase, compound, mixing the archaic (mammoths) with the contemporary (blingbling).

*Radio sink slow* and *lakey pearrs* add a warped domesticity to the oceanic cast. The series begins understated relative to later volumes.

## Track Listing

1. webbystreets
2. swimmer mammoths
3. seehorses
4. radio sink slow
5. lakey pearrs
6. ice cream eagle
7. blingbling mermaids
8. ballet starfish

## Archive Notes

Tracklist confirmed from MP3 filenames in archive. No Bandcamp URL identified — may be a private/distributed release. Exact release date unconfirmed; estimated ~2010 based on series chronology relative to other alphabets releases.
